One opening paragraph. `Install` and `Run it` are mandatory in the first screen — the reader must
see it working before any theory.

## Install

`cargo add nest-rs-<crate>` — one line.

## Run it

```
$ nestrs run dev api
... the observable result ...
```

## Wire it in

The module import. One snippet.

## Configuration

The dual-path rule: every field is settable via `NESTRS_*` env and the pinned struct. Table of
fields.
